message:
refactor(google-places): use operation-specific field masks with typed responses

Replace single optional default_field_mask with three distinct per-operation
masks (search_text_field_mask, autocomplete_field_mask, place_details_field_mask)
with sensible defaults. Add resolve_field_mask() helper to validate masks are
non-empty at request time, preventing silent API failures. Improve
decode_response<T>() to use DeserializeOwned generics instead of raw Value.

Add integration test suite for field mask validation and response parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
